title: Teaching the foundations of AI in the classroom
summary: Experience AI is a free educational program from Google DeepMind and the Raspberry Pi Foundation designed to help teachers introduce AI and machine learning to school-aged students. It provides research-backed lesson materials covering foundational AI concepts and responsible, ethical use, and has reached educators in over 165 countries.
